title: Splesh Culina Kitchen Towel - 15 XL Rolls (1050 Sheets) 3 Ply Ultra Absorbent & Extra Strong, Large Eco-Friendly Household Kitchen Rolls - 70 Super Sized Triple Layered Sheets Per Roll
features: Premium Kitchen Roll: Splesh Culina Xl 3-ply Kitchen Towel Is A Premium Choice For Your Kitchen Needs. Our Kitchen Towel Is Made Of High-quality, Triple Layered Paper That Is Soft, Strong, And Highly Absorbent.

Triple Layered Structure: The Spelsh Culina Kitchen Towel Is Made With A 3-ply Triple Layered Structure Using Patented Air Mill Technology Which Makes It Extra Thick Providing Strength And Absorbency.
Our Extra Large Sheets Measure 275mm X 275mm Making Them Bigger Than The Average Kitchen Towel To Give You More Value And Convenience Reducing The Number Of Sheets You Need To Use.

The Ultimate Solution For Your Kitchen Needs: The 3-ply Structure Consists Of Three Layers Of Paper To Create A Thick And Durable Towel. This Allows The Kitchen Towel To Soak Up More Liquid And Hold It For Longer, Without Dripping Or Tearing. Perfect For Dealing With Even The Largest Of Spills Making Them Perfect For Wiping, Cleaning And Drying Various Surfaces And Utensils In Your Kitchen. They Are Also Suitable For Other Daily Household Purposes Such As Dusting And Polishing.

Hygienic & Convenient: Splesh Culina Xl 3-ply Bulk Kitchen Paper Towels Are A Hygienic And Convenient Way To Keep Your Kitchen Clean And Tidy. They Are Easy To Tear And Dispense, And Have A Perforated Design That Prevents Wastage.
Get More Value With Each Roll: 15 Super-sized Household Kitchen Paper Rolls, Providing You With A Total Of 70 Triple-layered, Absorbent Sheets. In Total 1050 Sheets Of Kitchen Towel Paper!

Made In Britain & Environmentally Friendly: This Kitchen Roll Is Proudly Made In The Uk From Materials Sourced From Responsibly Managed Forests And Controlled Sources Ensuring High-quality Standards While Supporting Local Manufacturing.

This Kitchen Towel is 3-ply, which means each sheet is composed of three layers. This construction enhances its strength, softness, and absorbency compared to lower ply options. What is the sheet count per roll? Up to 210 sheets per roll. Is this kitchen towel environmentally responsible or crafted from regenerated fibers? Our Splesh Culina Kitchen Towel roll is made from materials sourced from responsibly managed forests and controlled sources.
